topic: House composition and CP analysis for meta-question 41387
summary: Democrats at 213 vs Republicans 219 with 3 vacancies. Gap has widened from 3 to 6 seats. CP was ~60% in Feb 2025 but question now seems very unlikely to resolve Yes. Meta-question asks if CP > 9% on Jan 14.
content: Current House: D 213, R 219, 3 vacant. Democrats never controlled House during 119th Congress. Even after filling vacancies: D 215, R 220. Need 7+ seat net swing through special elections, which is extremely unlikely. CP history shows only Feb 2025 data at ~60%. With 22 forecasters and strong evidence against, CP should be low but uncertain whether it's above or below 9%.
